_meta.description: Active class skills. [X]/[Y]/[Z] and ~% are level-scaled placeholders from the source.

skills.name: Blighted Rounds
skills.desc: Fill your current weapon's magazine with decay-infused bullets that inflict Toxic onto enemies. Enemies within a small radius of the main target also receive Toxic and 50% of damage. The skill lasts until you reload or switch weapons.

skills.name: Blighted Turret
skills.desc: Place an automated turret that deals [Z] damage and inflicts Toxic onto enemies. The turret's health depletes slowly over time and when it takes damage.

skills.name: Cryo Turret
skills.desc: Place an automated turret that deals ~2% damage and inflicts Freeze onto enemies. The turret's health depletes slowly over time and when it takes damage.

skills.name: Fixing Wave
skills.desc: Release your energy to restore [X]% of Health to all players and [Y]% of Health to your turrets, regardless of distance.

skills.name: Cold Snap
skills.desc: Drop a gadget to inflict Freeze onto all enemies within a large radius around you.

skills.name: Scrapnel
skills.desc: Throw a proximity mine. The explosion deals ~77% damage and Interrupts the skills of enemies caught within the blast radius.

skills.name: Pain Launcher
skills.desc: Place a missile launcher and bomb the area in front of you. Each missile deals ~13% damage per hit and Interrupts enemy skills.

skills.name: Tool Of Destruction
skills.desc: Press the skill button to equip a Rocket Launcher that can Interrupt enemies and deals [X] damage. Hold the skill button for a Minigun that deals [Z] damage per shot. The skill will remain active until all ammo is depleted or until you switch weapons.
